name: Notebook Entry
description: An electronic lab notebook (ELN) entry card combining rich text, embedded images, LaTeX-rendered formulas, timestamp-chained edit history, and reviewer annotations for scientific record-keeping and witness-signing compliance.

standard.description: Full rich-entry rendering with header, body content (text/images/formulas/tables), timestamp chain, and signature block. Intended as the primary reading view for lab notebook entries in research ELN systems.

minimal.description: Text-only collapsed rendering suitable for linked-entry preview cards and search results. Hides images and formulas, shows only header metadata and a truncated text body with expand-to-read action.

review.description: Review-mode rendering with reviewer annotation marginalia visible alongside the entry body. ReviewerNotes render as yellow sticky-note cards in the right margin anchored to the text range they annotate.

visual_brief: A lab-notebook entry rendered as a d-surface document with a thin left accent border and generous padding reflecting the feel of a bound laboratory notebook page. The EntryHeader at the top shows: a DateBadge pill with full date and time ('April 5, 2026 — 14:23'), an experiment-ID chip ('EXP-2026-042'), and an AuthorAvatar (32px circle) with author name and role beneath. A title in text-2xl semibold follows ('Protein Expression Optimization — Trial 3'). A horizontal rule separates header from body. The RichContent body flows in a newspaper-column-inspired layout with readable line-height (1.6) and max-width 70ch. TextBlocks render as paragraphs with proper typography. ImageEmbeds appear as centered figures with thin borders, captions beneath ('Figure 1: SDS-PAGE gel showing lane 1-6 expressed protein') in text-sm italic, and click-to-enlarge behavior opening a full-resolution lightbox. FormulaBlocks render mathematical expressions via LaTeX (e.g., 'OD600 = log(I₀/I) × path-length') in a display-math style with subtle gray background inset. Data tables render with monospaced headers and tabular-nums cells. The TimestampChain sits at the bottom of the entry showing edit-history as a horizontal chain: small timestamp pills connected with arrows ('Created 14:23 → Edited 15:47 → Edited 16:12'). Each pill shows user initial + time, hoverable for full diff. In review preset, ReviewerNotes render as yellow sticky-note cards in the right margin, anchored by thin connector lines to the text range they annotate, with reviewer avatar, note text, and 'resolve' button. A SignatureBlock at the very bottom shows the author signature (e.g., 'Signed: J. Chen 16:12 EDT') and when witnessed, a co-signer block ('Witnessed by: S. Park 17:04 EDT') with tamper-evident hash of the content. The entire entry becomes immutable after signing — further edits create a new dated revision.

layout_hints.note: ELN entries are regulated scientific records (21 CFR Part 11 compliant). After signature, entries are immutable. Edits create new revisions with full diff preserved.
layout_hints.rich_content_width: RichContent body max-width 70ch for readable line-length. Line-height 1.6. Paragraph spacing generous.
layout_hints.image_embed: ImageEmbed figures centered with 1px border, 8px padding, and caption beneath in text-sm italic. Click opens lightbox at full resolution.
layout_hints.formula_block: FormulaBlock uses MathJax/KaTeX rendering, display-math style. Inset gray background for visual distinction from body text.
layout_hints.timestamp_chain: TimestampChain shows ALL edits with user+timestamp. Never hides revision history. Hoverable pills show diff of that edit.
layout_hints.signature_block: SignatureBlock hashes entry content at time of signing for tamper-evidence. After witness co-signature, entry enters locked state (no further edits allowed, only appended revisions).

slots.entry-header: Top section with DateBadge, experiment-ID chip, AuthorAvatar + name + role, and entry title (text-2xl semibold). Horizontal rule separates header from body.
slots.rich-content: Main body content with mixed block types: TextBlocks (paragraphs), ImageEmbeds (figures with captions), FormulaBlocks (LaTeX math), tables, lists, quotes. Newspaper-column typography with max-width 70ch.
slots.image-embeds: Repeating sub-slot within rich-content. Figure elements with centered image, thin border, italic caption, and click-to-lightbox behavior. Numbered automatically (Figure 1, Figure 2...).
slots.formula-blocks: Repeating sub-slot within rich-content. LaTeX-rendered mathematical expressions in display-math style with subtle gray background.
slots.timestamp-chain: Horizontal chain of edit-history pills at bottom of entry. Each pill shows user initial + time, hoverable to reveal diff. Chain uses arrows connecting pills chronologically.
slots.reviewer-notes: Review-preset-only slot. Yellow sticky-note cards in right margin anchored by connector lines to annotated text ranges. Each note shows reviewer avatar, text, timestamp, and resolve action.
slots.signature-block: Footer at entry end showing author signature with timestamp and optional witness co-signature. Includes tamper-evidence content hash. Locks entry from further edits after witnessing.

announcements: Entry signed by {author} and witnessed by {witness}

responsive.mobile: Entry expands to full width with reduced padding. ReviewerNotes collapse into inline indicators that expand on tap. ImageEmbeds fit 100% width. FormulaBlocks allow horizontal scroll.
responsive.tablet: Standard document at max-w-820px. Review preset maintains right margin ReviewerNotes at reduced 200px width.

transitions.image-lightbox: image scale + fade from thumbnail to fullscreen 300ms ease-out
transitions.signature-lock: border color shift to success + content dim 400ms ease-out

ambient.unsigned-pulse: SignatureBlock subtle amber tint pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite when entry unsigned

composition.NotebookEntry: Surface(d-surface, document, border-left-accent) > [EntryHeader + RichContent + TimestampChain + ReviewerNote[]? + SignatureBlock]
composition.ReviewerNote: Card(d-surface, data-note, sticky-yellow, margin-right) > [ReviewerAvatar + NoteText + Timestamp + ResolveButton + AnchorLine]
